narrative:
Jackson 29 (precinct in Stark County) has 907 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
